name: Chunky Guacamole
recipeIngredient: 3 Plum tomatoes, seeded and finely diced
2 Scallions, white part only, trimmed and thinly sliced
1/2 Red bell pepper, seeded and finely diced
1/2 Jalapeno pepper, seeded and finely chopped
1/2 juice of lime (or more to taste)
Freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all the ingredients except the avocado in a non-reactive bowl.
2. Stir to mix thoroughly.
3. Cover and set aside until serving time. This can be made up to 2 hours ahead. Cover it well and refrigerate until needed.
4. Right before serving, peel, pit, and cut the avocado into small cubes.
5. Gently stir the cubed avocado into the guacamole.
6. To serve: Arrange the waffles on a large platter or pile them in a basket as you would chips. Spoon the guacamole into one bowl and the sour cream into another. Encourage guests to put a dollop of each on a waffle chip and dig in.
